name: Arizona Chicken Fajitas
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince the garlic.
2. Cut the bell pepper and onion into strips.
3. Cut the tomato into chunks.
4. In a glass bowl or baking dish, combine 1/2 cup oil, lime juice, tequila, tomato paste, minced garlic, jalapeno, salt, chili powder, and cumin.
5. Blend well.
6. Add chicken breast and marinate in the refrigerator for at least 6 hours or overnight.
7. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
8. Wrap the tortillas in aluminum foil and bake for 15 minutes while preparing the fajitas.
9. Remove the chicken from the marinade.
10. In a large, heavy skillet over medium-high heat, heat 3 tablespoons oil.
11. Add the chicken and cook, stirring constantly, for 5 to 7 minutes or until done.
12. Add the bell pepper and onion and cook for an additional 3 minutes, just until vegetables are crisp-tender.
13. Serve with tortillas, guacamole, sour cream, salsa, and cheese.
